content: All core Memory Bank files reside within the `memory-bank/` directory at the project root.
Do NOT create or modify these files outside the `memory-bank/` directory unless explicitly instructed for archiving purposes.
The content of `memory-bank/tasks.md` is merged into the main archive document for the task upon completion, and after archival, `tasks.md` is cleared to be ready for the next task.
Before any `create_file` or `edit_file` operation on core Memory Bank files, verify the path starts with `memory-bank/`.
If attempting to create a new core file (e.g., `tasks.md` at the start of a project), ensure it is created at the correct path within the `memory-bank/` directory.
